chapter_title.en: The Reward of the Night Prayer

parts.text: 1364 - وَ رَوَى هِشَامُ بْنُ سَالِمٍ عَنْهُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ

text: : فِي قَوْلِ اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ: «إِنَّ نٰاشِئَةَ اَللَّيْلِ هِيَ أَشَدُّ وَطْئاً وَ أَقْوَمُ قِيلاً » قَالَ «قِيَامُ اَلرَّجُلِ عَنْ فِرَاشِهِ يُرِيدُ بِهِ وَجْهَ اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ لاَ يُرِيدُ بِهِ غَيْرَهُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1364 - Hisham ibn Salim reported that Imam (as) said regarding the words of Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic:
"Indeed, the rising by night is [more effective] for concurrence [of heart and tongue] and more suitable for words" (Surah Al-Qiyamah 73:6).
Imam (as) said: "It refers to a person rising from their bed for the sake of Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, seeking nothing but His pleasure.
